title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Turning Point
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #16 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #21, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: What?! whose kid is this, anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Young ace has finally set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: The hell is that?!!! Stupid idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: but I can't let him beat me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: No, you go on down there alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Well, then... thanks for everything, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I'm finally heading out to sea too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: It isn't a charm!! It's a challenge!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Well, then... I'll be going now!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Dadan, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #21, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.
